downloader.title: Multi-Platform → MP3 Downloader
downloader.subtitle: Paste a link from TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Vimeo or SoundCloud and grab the audio.
downloader.metaDescription: Multi-platform Video to MP3 Downloader — TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, Vimeo, SoundCloud. Paste a link and download the audio.
downloader.invalidLink: Enter a valid link from a supported platform.
downloader.disclaimer: Toolando.tech does not host or download any media. It only detects the platform and the public video ID and hands off to an external service or your browser. Only download content you have the rights to.
downloader.externalNote: Download happens on an external service or in your browser. Toolando.tech only captured the public platform and video ID. Please respect copyright and each platform's terms of service.

faq.a: TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook, Twitter/X, Vimeo and SoundCloud — just paste a public link and the platform is detected automatically. YouTube is temporarily paused because YouTube actively blocks downloaders.

faq.q: Does Toolando.tech download the video on its servers?
faq.a: No. Toolando.tech never downloads or stores media. It only reads the public link to detect the platform and video ID, then hands off to an external service or your browser.
Yes, detecting the link and reading public metadata is completely free.

faq.q: Why do I only see a thumbnail for some links?
faq.a: We only show thumbnails that are publicly available without any login or API — for example YouTube's public image CDN. For other platforms the thumbnail may not be shown.

faq.q: Is it legal to download the audio?
faq.a: Only download content you own or have permission to use. Downloading copyrighted material without permission may violate the platform's terms of service and copyright law.

downloader.platformDisabled: Downloading from {platform} is temporarily unavailable — {platform} actively blocks downloaders, so we've paused it until our own converter is ready. All other platforms still work.

about.title: Hi, I'm Szymon — the creator of Toolando
about.intro: Toolando.tech is my own project that I build on my own. From the idea, through the code, to the content you're reading now — it all comes from one pair of hands. I want simple tasks, like converting a file or a quick online tool, to be available to everyone, with no software to install and no needless complications.
about.whyP1: I work with computers every day and I've seen many times how much time people lose on tasks that should take a moment — changing a file format, extracting audio from a recording, or a quick operation that forces you to hunt for some random site full of ads and traps.
about.whyP2: Toolando was created to gather such tools in one clear and safe place. I care about the service being fast, readable, and honest toward the user — with no tricks and no hidden catches.
about.howIntro: The service provides online tools in two variants: free and premium.
about.howFreeDesc: available to everyone, without an account. These are the everyday, most-used features that I want to keep open to all.
about.howPremiumDesc: more advanced features or higher limits that help maintain and grow the project. Premium revenue goes straight to servers, development, and new tools.
about.howOutro: Regardless of the variant, I stick to the same rule: uploaded files are used solely to perform the conversion and are not stored by me.
about.outsideP1: I provide IT services — helping individuals and companies with everyday hardware and software problems.
outsideList: servicing and repairing laptops and computers,
about.outsideP2: Experience from repairs and working with users translates directly into how I design Toolando — simple, to the point, and with real needs in mind.
about.contactP1: Have a question, an idea for a new tool, or want to report a problem? Write to me — I'll gladly reply.

howItWorks.title: How the tools in Toolando work
howItWorks.intro: Toolando.tech is a set of online tools you run right in your browser — with nothing to install. Below I explain how file processing works, how I take care of security, and how free tools differ from premium.
howItWorks.browserTitle: Tools that run in the browser
howItWorks.browserP: You open a tool, choose a file or enter data, and you get the result right on the page. You don't need an account to use the free tools, and you don't need to install anything on your computer.
howItWorks.filesIntro: Depending on the type of tool, files are processed in two ways:
howItWorks.filesLocalDesc: some operations run directly on your device, and the file never leaves your computer at all.
howItWorks.filesServerDesc: when a tool needs more computing power, the file is processed on the server only for the duration of the conversion, and then deleted.
howItWorks.filesOutro: In none of these cases do I store your files or use them for any other purpose.
howItWorks.securityP: Security and privacy are a priority for me. The connection to the site is encrypted, and files are used solely to perform the task you request.
securityList: uploaded files are not stored after the operation is complete,
I do not sell or share your data,
you don't need to provide personal data to use the free tools.
howItWorks.tiersP: Toolando offers tools in two variants, but the security principle is the same in both.
howItWorks.tiersFreeDesc: available to everyone, without an account. Perfect for everyday, quick tasks.
howItWorks.tiersPremiumDesc: more advanced features and higher limits or larger files. Premium supports server maintenance and the development of new tools.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: I've gathered here the answers to the questions that come up most often. If you can't find what you're looking for, write to me at badyltech@outlook.com.

items.a: Most tools are fully free and available without creating an account. Some more advanced features and higher limits are available in the premium variant, which supports maintaining and developing the service.

items.q: How do free tools differ from premium?
items.a: Free tools cover everyday, most common tasks and are open to everyone. Premium offers more advanced features and larger files or limits. The file security principle is the same in both variants.

Yes. Uploaded files are used solely to perform the conversion and are not stored by me. Some operations run locally in the browser, and if a file goes to the server, it is processed only for the duration of the task and then deleted.

items.q: Does Toolando store the files I upload?
items.a: No. I do not save your files after the operation is complete and I do not use them for any other purpose.

items.q: How do you protect my privacy?
items.a: I process only technical and statistical data (e.g. IP address, browser type, system, site traffic), in line with the GDPR. You'll find the details in the Privacy Policy. You don't need to provide personal data to use the free tools.

items.q: Do I have to create an account to use the tools?
items.a: No. The free tools work without an account. An account may only be needed for premium features.

items.q: Are there ads on the site?
items.a: Yes, the service may display Google AdSense ads, which help keep the free tools available to everyone.

items.q: How do the online tools work?
items.a: You open a tool in your browser, choose a file or enter data, and get the result right away — with nothing to install. I've described more details on the “How it works?” page.

items.q: How can I get in touch?
items.a: Write to badyltech@outlook.com or use the contact form. I reply as quickly as possible.

privacy.title: Toolando.tech Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Toolando.tech is a service providing online tools in a free and premium variant. I care about users' privacy and process data in accordance with applicable regulations, including the GDPR.
privacy.s1Pre: The data controller is Szymon, the owner of Toolando.tech. For privacy matters you can contact me at:
privacy.s2Intro: The service processes technical and statistical data that is collected automatically while using the site:
s2List: traffic and usage data (e.g. pages visited).
privacy.s2Outro: If you contact me by email or form, I also process the email address you provide and the content of your message.
privacy.s3P: Files you upload to the tools for conversion or another operation are not stored by me. They are used solely to perform the task you request and are deleted once it is complete. I do not use them for any other purpose.
privacy.s4Intro: The service uses the following types of cookies:
privacy.s4TechDesc: necessary for the site to work correctly and to remember settings (e.g. language).
privacy.s4AnalyticsDesc: statistical tools (e.g. Google Analytics) that help understand how the site is used, in aggregate and anonymous form.
privacy.s4AdsDesc: Google AdSense, which may use cookies to display and personalize ads.
privacy.s4Outro: You can manage or disable cookies at any time in your browser settings.
privacy.s5P: Toolando provides free tools (available without an account) and premium tools. The rules for data processing and file protection are the same in both variants — they differ only in the range of features and limits.
privacy.s6Intro: I process data solely for the following purposes:
s6List: ensuring the correct and secure operation of the service,
statistical traffic analysis and improving the tools,
s7List: lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection authority.
privacy.s8P: The privacy policy may be updated to reflect changes in the service or in the law. The current version is always available on this page.

terms.title: Terms of Service for Toolando.tech
terms.intro: The terms below set out the rules for using the Toolando.tech service. Using the service means you accept these rules.
terms.s1P: The owner of Toolando.tech is Szymon. The service provides online tools for file conversion, content generation, and AI-powered tools.
terms.s2Intro: Toolando offers tools in two variants:
terms.s2FreeDesc: available to everyone, without the need to create an account.
terms.s2PremiumDesc: with more advanced features and higher limits.
terms.s2Outro: Rules regarding any payments or subscriptions for premium features are presented in the relevant places on the service.
terms.s3P1: You use the service at your own risk. I make every effort for the tools to work correctly, however the service is provided “as is”, with no guarantee of availability, correctness of results, or fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.s3P2: The service owner is not liable for:
s3List: the consequences of using the tools' results,
damage resulting from interruptions in the service.
terms.s3Outro: The user undertakes to use the service in accordance with the law and is responsible for the content and files they process.
terms.s4P: Files uploaded to the tools are not stored. They are used solely to perform the given operation and are deleted once it is complete.
terms.s5P: The service may display Google AdSense ads. Ads help maintain the free tools and develop the project. The ad provider may use cookies in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
terms.s6P: The name Toolando.tech, graphic elements, and the service's content are legally protected. Copying and using them without the owner's consent is prohibited.
terms.s7Pre: For matters related to these terms you can contact me at:
terms.s8P: The terms may be updated to reflect changes in the service or in the law. The current version is always available on this page.
